description: Chronopost est spécialisée dans la livraison express de colis jusqu’à 30kg aux entreprises et aux particuliers.-------------------------------------Contact Service ClientPour toute information sur vos colis, consultez votre suivi 24h/24 et 7j/7 en ligne sur notre site ou en posant la question à notre Chatbot Léonard !Nos conseillers clients sont à votre écoute du lundi au vendredi de 8h à 19h et le samedi de 8h à 12h. au 09 69 391 391 *sur Messengersur Twitter (DM)sur chronopost.fr* Appel non surtaxé-------------------------------------ImportantNotez que pour la sécurité de vos colis et de vos données, nous vous recommandons de ne jamais communiquer vos numéros de suivi en public !-------------------------------------

name: Temu FR
description: Temu is a global e-commerce platform founded in Boston, Massachusetts in 2022, serving customers in more than 90 markets worldwide. It connects consumers with millions of independent manufacturers, brands, and sellers to offer a wide selection of quality products across hundreds of categories — from home goods and pet supplies to DIY tools and automotive accessories — at affordable prices. To complement its cross-border model, Temu has also launched the Local Seller Program in multiple markets, enabling businesses of all sizes to sell and ship locally while offering consumers shorter delivery distances and more efficient return processes. Temu’s mission is to make quality products more accessible to more consumers by reducing unnecessary costs and middlemen markups.If you have any questions or concerns while shopping at Temu, please contact our customer service through this link: https://m.temu.com/t/ZXIdkZadzEA
